branches.reason: Live pilot artifacts, workflow snapshot/rollback, policy result, and adoption validation are present. Branch also includes remote normalization commit for duplicate pull request template path.
required_follow_up: Review adoption diff and merge if the pilot is accepted.
Treat CI/workflow validation as expected-failure until remote CI execution is intentionally run.

branches.reason: This branch only captured the pre-existing dirty PR template state and was superseded by path normalization on the adoption branch.
required_follow_up: Keep as reference only, or close without merge after confirming no longer needed.

notes: The original local clone on Windows had a case-conflict between .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md and .github/pull_request_template.md.
Use the clean working root for any further local work on the adoption branch.
